problem id: d50746e7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND SHL(4)) XOR ROT(4)

examples:
  00110010 -> 00100011
  11100011 -> 00111110
  01100010 -> 00100110
  00000001 -> 00010000
  11000100 -> 01001100
  11001110 -> 11001100
  01011101 -> 10000101
  01101101 -> 01000110

query: 00101100
predicted answer: 01000010
